message:
fix: tighten bearer token regex to prevent false positives in cm doctor

Require at least 20 characters of base64-like content after "Bearer " before
considering it a real token. This prevents benign text like "Bearer of bad
news" from triggering the sanitization pattern, which was causing cm doctor
to report overallStatus: degraded with false positive warnings.

Closes #32

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
